description_long: This is a white ceramic cup filled with a dark liquid, likely coffee or hot chocolate, as indicated by the visible steam rising from the surface. The cup has a gently flared rim and a smoothly curved body, sitting atop a matching white saucer. A metallic teaspoon rests on the saucer, positioned differently in each view, and the cup features a single, rounded handle. The surface of the cup and saucer is glossy and smooth, reflecting light softly. There are no visible logos, patterns, or decorative elements, giving the set a minimalist and modern appearance.
description: A glossy white ceramic cup with a handle, filled with a hot dark beverage, sits on a matching saucer with a metal teaspoon.
description_view_0: The cup is seen from the front, with the handle on the right and the teaspoon resting on the saucer to the left.
description_view_1: The cup is viewed from the back, showing the handle on the far side and the teaspoon partially hidden behind the cup.
description_view_2: The cup is seen from the left side, with the handle on the left and the teaspoon placed on the right side of the saucer.
description_view_3: The cup is viewed from the right, with the handle on the right and the teaspoon resting in front of the cup on the saucer.
